title: chamaecytisus absinthioides
intro: Chamaecytisus absinthioides, also known as the lesser burnet, is a flowering plant species in the pea family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The lesser burnet is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Chamaecytisus absinthioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some folk remedies as a substitute for the more well-known absinthe plant.
